{{Quote|Scanners show the ''Tyranny'' deployed numerous sentry drones just before it left for Kuat—the Fresian system is locked down!|A [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]], to [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''</ref>}}
The '''Fre'ji system''' was a four-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]] that contained the planet [[Fresia/Legends|Fresia]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{System-stub}}
